metadata.scope: Draw risk threshold coverage analysis across all World Cup historical backtest matches
metadata.note: Read-only audit only. Conditions are measured historically and are not written back to model, recommendation logic, probabilities, or frontend.

ranking.condition: Draw Probability >= 25% AND Predicted Total Goals <= 3
Draw Probability >= 25% AND Win Probability Gap <= 15%
Draw Probability >= 25% AND Win Probability Gap <= 15% AND Predicted Total Goals <= 3
